title: Crispy Lamb Bowl with Peruvian Twist
description: A flavorful and aromatic bowl dish featuring crispy lamb, crunchy garlicky elements, and a hint of Peruvian spices.
instructions: Season the lamb with salt and bake for 20 minutes.
In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced aji amarillo peppers and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the cooked lamb to the pan and stir to combine.
Warm the crispy plantain chips in the oven for 2 minutes.
To assemble the bowls, place a portion of the lamb mixture on the bottom.
Top with crushed plantain chips, chopped cilantro, and a squeeze of lime juice.
